title: NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Block Manager, Cluster Supervisor and More Posts
organization: National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka (NRLM Karnataka)
post_name: Block Technical Coordinator – Enterprise Promotion OSF, Cluster Supervisor - Skill, Block Manager - Farm Livelihoods
short_info: National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka (NRLM Karnataka) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 5 Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Management, Commerce, or Engineering, Any Graduation, M.Sc. (Agri) / B.Sc. (Agri) / Master degree in farm livelihoods
qualification.details: Block Technical Coordinator – Enterprise Promotion OSF: Post Graduate in Management, Commerce, or Engineering from an institution of repute. Preference will be given to Young Professionals who have served in NRLM with any Post Graduation. Cluster Supervisor - Skill: Any Graduation Block Manager - Farm Livelihoods: M.Sc. (Agri) and allied sciences of farm sector with minimum 01 years of field level work experience in relevant field or B.Sc. (Agri) and allied sciences of farm sector with minimum 03 years of field level work experience in relevant field or Any other Master degree with minimum 05 years of field level work experience in farm livelihoods or relevant field.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Block Technical Coordinator – Enterprise Promotion OSF

salary_details.details: Block Technical Coordinator – Enterprise Promotion OSF: Rs. 42000 Per Month Cluster Supervisor - Skill: Rs. 18000 Per Month Block Manager - Farm Livelihoods: Rs. 25000 Per Month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NRLM Karnataka Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NRLM Karnataka to complete the application.
